sentiment.reasoning: An 18% increase in customer acquisition is a strong indicator of growth and demand.

sentiment.reasoning: Product recalls due to quality concerns damage brand reputation and incur immediate remediation costs.

headlines.headline: Jorvyl Securities files routine patent applications in digital payments

sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard administrative actions that do not impact near-term financial performance.

headlines.headline: Jorvyl Securities recalls products in enterprise software line due to quality concerns

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
